classification_rationale: Repo contains only README.md and package.json with a single git commit "chore: initialize new repository" (c770140). No src/, schemas, contracts, or tests. README.md:43 states it is a "New repository created during multi-repo reorganization (2025-11-14)". package.json:6 points main to ./dist/index.js which does not exist; package.json:16 test is echo 'Test script TBD'. It is an empty placeholder scaffold with zero implemented protocol surface.
primary_purpose: Intended (currently unimplemented) official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for building on AFI Protocol (README.md:3 "TypeScript SDK for AFI Protocol"; package.json:3).
protocol_touchpoints: USS/CPJ ingest (implied by README 'Signal submission and validation helpers' but NOT implemented)

reference_only_assumptions.quote:
// Submit a signal
await client.signals.submit({ type: 'market-data', data: { ... } });

contradictions.title: SDK narrative anchored to afi-reactor (reference impl) rather than canonical dialect/schemas
contradictions.detail: README presents the SDK's primary feature as clients for the reactor, reinforcing the reactor-as-THE-orchestrator tension instead of pointing consumers at USS/CPJ schemas and afi-config validation. Currently harmless because nothing is implemented, but the framing should target the portable protocol's canonical surface.

notable_findings.title: Repo is an empty scaffold with no implementation
notable_findings.evidence: git ls-files => README.md, package.json only; single commit c770140; README.md:43 'New repository created during multi-repo reorganization (2025-11-14)'
notable_findings.recommendation: Tag as stale placeholder; revisit when SDK implementation lands and verify it validates against USS v1.1 / CPJ v0.1 and afi-config schemas rather than coupling solely to afi-reactor.

notable_findings.title: All protocol pattern-group searches return ZERO hits
notable_findings.evidence: No source files exist to match mongodb/TSSD/vault, usignal/USS/cpj/CPJ, mintForSignal/coordinateMint/beneficiary/epoch, replay/determinism/codex, publicSurface/proprietaryDetail, AFIMintCoordinator/AFISignalReceipt/EmissionsMinted, pipeline/DAG/froggy/orchestrator/doctrine, BigQuery/kafka/warehouse, normative/canonical, postgresql/timescaledb/influxdb

notable_findings.title: package.json points to non-existent build output and stub test
README example signal shape unvalidated against canonical ingest dialects
notable_findings.recommendation: When implemented, ensure submit payloads conform to USS v1.1 / CPJ v0.1 schemas in afi-config rather than an ad-hoc shape.
